title: ReviewVerdict
description: Structured code review verdict for the dev-review loop

verdict.description: APPROVED if code is ready to merge. REVISE if changes are needed.

summary.description: One-paragraph assessment of the code changes.

severity.description: CRITICAL=blocks merge, HIGH=should fix, MEDIUM=worth fixing, LOW=nitpick

file.description: File path relative to project root

issues.description: List of issues found. Empty array if none.

scope_creep_detected.description: True if changes go beyond the original task scope

iteration_notes.description: Guidance for the developer's next iteration if verdict is REVISE
